PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/passwd'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''root'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
